content: Current research treats Self-Refine as a generic iterative self-improvement pipeline for LLMs, but it can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break the local optimization trap that plagues single-perspective iterative refinement. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervision while addressing its key limitation of getting stuck in feedback loops aligned with the model's own inherent biases.
